attributes.Pre SQL: DELETE FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_GPOS_OA_TRANSACTION_LINE MGOTL WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_GPOS_OA_TRANSACTION_LINE WGOTL  WHERE WGOTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=MGOTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT AND MGOTL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT=WGOTL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT);
